_description: Per-artifact question banks for /draft mode. For each of the 4 v1 artifacts, framing questions the operator answers to refine the render beyond what the source recommendation provides. Questions are asked before drafting begins, after the anti-pattern checklist is surfaced. Structure: {artifact_type: [{question_id, question_text, default_answer, when_to_skip}]}.

all-hands-announcement.question_text: Who is the primary speaker for this announcement — CEO or CHRO?
all-hands-announcement.when_to_skip: Skip if engagement-comms-config.yaml artifact[].speaker is already set and operator has not requested override.

all-hands-announcement.question_text: Is this announcement going to both email and intranet, or one channel only?
all-hands-announcement.when_to_skip: Skip if valid_channels is set to a single channel in engagement-comms-config.yaml.

all-hands-announcement.question_text: What is the effective date that should appear prominently in the announcement?
all-hands-announcement.when_to_skip: Skip if cycle.effective_date is present in compensation-advisor source (checkpoint.yaml or engagement-state.yaml).

all-hands-announcement.question_text: Is there a single call-to-action at the end — e.g., 'contact your HRBP' or 'attend the team meeting on <date>'? If yes, what is it?
all-hands-announcement.default_answer: Contact your HRBP or manager with questions.
all-hands-announcement.when_to_skip: Skip if org-comms-profile channel_rules.email.cta_style is already set.

all-hands-announcement.question_text: Are there any populations to call out specifically (e.g., employees on leave, part-time employees, employees who already received a market adjustment)?
all-hands-announcement.when_to_skip: Skip if no special populations noted in compensation-advisor source.

all-hands-announcement.question_text: Should the announcement mention the FR-CA glossary term for 'wage scale increase' — i.e., use 'augmentation salariale selon l'echelle' — or does the org have its own preferred FR-CA phrasing?
all-hands-announcement.when_to_skip: Skip if org-comms-profile has a validated FR-CA term for wage scale increase already.

manager-faq.question_text: Who is the speaker for this FAQ — CHRO or VP Ops?
manager-faq.when_to_skip: Skip if engagement-comms-config.yaml artifact[].speaker is already set.

manager-faq.question_text: What are the top 3 questions managers have already asked HR in informal channels about this cycle's changes? These will anchor the FAQ's first section.
manager-faq.when_to_skip: Never skip — this question always improves the FAQ quality. Proceed with compensation-advisor source only if operator says 'skip'.

manager-faq.question_text: Are there any questions managers should NOT answer themselves and should escalate to HRBP? (These go in the escalation-triggers section.)
manager-faq.default_answer: CBA interpretation, retroactive pay for employees on leave, individual reclassification requests.
manager-faq.when_to_skip: Skip if org-comms-profile.yaml hrbp-manager.escalation_scope is already populated.

manager-faq.question_text: Should the FAQ include talking points for the team meeting conversation — i.e., scripted opening lines for managers to use when they present the change to their team?
manager-faq.when_to_skip: Skip if operator confirms FAQ is informational only (no scripted delivery expected).

manager-faq.question_text: How many Q&A pairs should the FAQ target — the 10-question minimum, or up to 15-20 if the cycle is complex?
manager-faq.when_to_skip: Skip if operator has provided a specific count.

hrbp-enablement-memo.question_text: What are the 3-5 most likely edge cases HRBPs will encounter for this cycle? (E.g., employees on parental leave, employees mid-reclassification, employees whose grade was restructured.)
hrbp-enablement-memo.when_to_skip: Never skip — the edge-case appendix requires this. Proceed with generic placeholders if operator says 'skip'.

hrbp-enablement-memo.question_text: Is there a worked payroll calculation example to include — specific numbers the HRBP can show employees to explain the math?
hrbp-enablement-memo.when_to_skip: Skip if the cycle has no arithmetic component (e.g., flat-rate change where no calculation is required).

hrbp-enablement-memo.question_text: What is the escalation path above HRBP — i.e., if the HRBP cannot resolve, who do they call? (Name the role, not the person.)
hrbp-enablement-memo.when_to_skip: Skip if org-comms-profile already names the escalation chain.

hrbp-enablement-memo.question_text: Should the memo include a consultation script — specific language HRBPs can use when an employee escalates a concern directly?
hrbp-enablement-memo.when_to_skip: Skip only if operator confirms HRBPs are experienced and do not need a script.

hrbp-enablement-memo.question_text: Are there union-specific provisions HRBPs need to cite precisely — CBA article numbers, MOA references, ratification dates?
hrbp-enablement-memo.when_to_skip: Skip if the engagement covers non-union populations only.

hrbp-enablement-memo.question_text: Should the memo include a confidentiality instruction — reminding HRBPs of what they can and cannot share with employees about the compensation review process?
hrbp-enablement-memo.when_to_skip: Skip if the engagement is fully transparent (e.g., public-sector employer where process is public).

exec-one-pager.question_text: What is the primary ask of the board or exec committee for this artifact — approve the cost envelope, note for information, or ratify a prior decision?
exec-one-pager.when_to_skip: Skip if the recommendation-source specifies the governance action explicitly.

exec-one-pager.question_text: Should slide 1 lead with the decision (e.g., '3% wage scale increase for all hourly grades effective May 1') or with the context (e.g., 'Market wage pressure in Quebec retail has reached...')?
exec-one-pager.when_to_skip: Skip if org has a standing board deck convention on structure (surfaced during /brand init).

exec-one-pager.question_text: What is the annualized cost impact of this cycle's decision? (If multiple scenarios, use the chosen scenario's envelope.)
exec-one-pager.when_to_skip: Skip if cost envelope is in compensation-advisor source (checkpoint.yaml or engagement-state.yaml).

exec-one-pager.question_text: Should slide 2 include a prior-year comparison table (last cycle's envelope vs. this cycle's envelope)? Is the prior-cycle number confirmed?
exec-one-pager.default_answer: yes if prior_engagement_refs[] is present in source
exec-one-pager.when_to_skip: Skip if this is the first cycle with this org (no prior-year data).

exec-one-pager.question_text: Are there any compliance drivers to call out on slide 2 — e.g., Bill 96 obligations, pay equity audit findings, CBA ratification requirements?
exec-one-pager.when_to_skip: Skip if the cycle is a voluntary market adjustment with no regulatory trigger.
